interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage: featured treatments and offers, plus key CTAs.

interfaces.name: getTreatmentCategoriesForNav
interfaces.description: Get high-level treatment categories for navigation and treatments landing page.

interfaces.name: getTreatmentCategorySummary
interfaces.description: Get summary information for a treatment category to display at the top of the category page.

interfaces.name: getTreatmentFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the treatments listing within a category.

interfaces.name: searchTreatments
interfaces.description: Search and list treatments within a category, applying filters and sorting for the Treatments page.

interfaces.name: getTreatmentDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific treatment, for the Treatment Detail page.

parameters.name: treatmentId
parameters.description: ID of the treatment to display.

interfaces.name: calculateVeneerCost
interfaces.description: Calculate the total cost for a veneer treatment given a number of teeth, based on per-tooth pricing.

parameters.name: treatmentId
parameters.description: Veneer treatment ID whose per-tooth pricing will be used.

interfaces.name: requestTreatmentEstimate
interfaces.description: Submit a request to email a cost estimate for a specific treatment (from Smile Assessment or Treatment Detail).

parameters.name: treatmentId
parameters.description: Treatment that the estimate is for.

parameters.name: scopeSelection
parameters.description: Scope description like 'mild_to_moderate' or free text such as 'upper and lower front teeth'.

interfaces.name: submitTreatmentAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an appointment request for a specific treatment from its detail page.

parameters.name: treatmentId
parameters.description: Treatment to book (comes from Treatment Detail page context).

parameters.name: clinicId
parameters.description: Optional clinic to associate with this treatment appointment.

interfaces.name: getClinicSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Locations search page (radius and availability).

interfaces.name: searchClinics
interfaces.description: Search for clinics near a ZIP code with radius and availability filters.

interfaces.name: getClinicDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific clinic, including emergency availability.

parameters.name: clinicId
parameters.description: Clinic whose details will be shown.

interfaces.name: getEmergencyContactFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and display text for the emergency contact form for a clinic.

parameters.name: clinicId
parameters.description: Clinic from which the emergency form is opened.

interfaces.name: submitEmergencyContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an emergency contact request for a specific clinic.

interfaces.name: getDentistFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Dentists Directory page.

interfaces.name: searchDentists
interfaces.description: Search and list dentists with filters and sorting on the Dentists Directory page.

interfaces.name: getDentistProfile
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific dentist for the Dentist Profile page.

parameters.name: dentistId
parameters.description: Dentist whose profile is being viewed.

interfaces.name: submitDentistAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a consultation request with a specific dentist from her profile page.

parameters.name: dentistId
parameters.description: Dentist to book with (from Dentist Profile context).

parameters.name: clinicId
parameters.description: Optional clinic if the dentist practices at multiple locations.

interfaces.name: startSmileAssessment
interfaces.description: Initialize a new Smile Assessment for the single user and return the first question and options.

interfaces.name: answerSmileAssessmentStep
interfaces.description: Submit answers for the current Smile Assessment step and get the next question or completion state. Assessment session is managed internally for the single user.

parameters.name: selectedOptionKeys
parameters.description: Option value_keys selected for this step (for choice questions).

parameters.name: sliderValue
parameters.description: Numeric value for slider-type questions, if applicable.

parameters.name: textAnswer
parameters.description: Free-text answer for text questions, if applicable.

interfaces.name: getSmileAssessmentRecommendations
interfaces.description: Get recommended treatments after completing the Smile Assessment, with filters and sorting for the recommendations page.

interfaces.name: getSpecialOfferFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Special Offers page.

interfaces.name: listSpecialOffers
interfaces.description: List active special offers with filters for type and maximum price.

interfaces.name: getOfferDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific offer, including validity dates and inclusions, for the Offer Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitOfferAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an appointment request associated with a specific promotional offer.

parameters.name: offerId
parameters.description: Offer being claimed (from Offer Detail context).

parameters.name: clinicId
parameters.description: Clinic selected in the booking form.

parameters.name: promoCode
parameters.description: Optional promo code if present on the offer.

interfaces.name: getFinancingCalculatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the Financing & Payment Plans calculator: available treatments, term ranges, and interest options.

interfaces.name: calculateFinancingPlan
interfaces.description: Calculate an estimated monthly payment for a given treatment cost, term, and interest for display in the financing calculator.

parameters.name: treatmentId
parameters.description: Optional specific treatment reference if coming from a treatment page.

interfaces.name: submitFinancingApplication
interfaces.description: Submit a financing application or request for a calculated payment plan.

parameters.name: treatmentId
parameters.description: Optional treatment if coming from a specific treatment page.

interfaces.name: saveFinancingPlan
interfaces.description: Save or email a financing plan configuration from the calculator (e.g., for veneers).

interfaces.name: getSmileGalleryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Smile Gallery page (treatment type, tooth area, number of visits).

interfaces.name: searchSmileGalleryCases
interfaces.description: Search Smile Gallery cases with filters for treatment type, tooth area, and number of visits.

interfaces.name: getSmileGalleryCaseDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific Smile Gallery case.

interfaces.name: addCaseToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add a Smile Gallery case to the single-user favorites list.

parameters.name: caseId
parameters.description: Case to add (from Case Detail or Gallery context).

interfaces.name: removeCaseFromFavorites
interfaces.description: Remove a Smile Gallery case from the single-user favorites list.

interfaces.name: reorderFavorites
interfaces.description: Reorder the favorites list by providing a new ordered list of case IDs.

interfaces.name: getFavoritesList
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user favorites list and resolved case summaries for the Favorites page.

interfaces.name: submitCaseInquiryFromFavorite
interfaces.description: Submit a request for a similar result based on a saved Smile Gallery case from the Favorites page.

parameters.name: caseId
parameters.description: Saved case the inquiry refers to.

interfaces.name: submitClinicAppointmentRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a general appointment request from a Clinic Detail page (e.g., checkup or cosmetic consultation).

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including mission, expertise, and key CTAs.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Contact page: main contact details and location summary.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general, non-urgent contact form from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyAndTermsContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Privacy & Terms page, including privacy policy and terms of use.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateAssessmentSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or retrieve the single-user Smile AssessmentSession, stored in internal state.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoritesList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or retrieve the single-user FavoritesList, stored in internal state.

helperFunctions.name: _createAppointmentRequestRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist an AppointmentRequest with appropriate source_page and associations.

helperFunctions.name: _createEmergencyContactRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist an EmergencyContactRequest linked to a clinic.

helperFunctions.name: _createFinancingApplicationRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a FinancingApplication from calculator inputs and user details.

helperFunctions.name: _createSavedFinancingPlanRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a SavedFinancingPlan and optionally trigger email delivery.

helperFunctions.name: _createEstimateRequestRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist an EstimateRequest and initiate estimate generation.

helperFunctions.name: _createCaseInquiryRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a CaseInquiry referencing a specific SmileGalleryCase.

helperFunctions.name: _persistSingleUserState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist and restore single-user state (assessment session, favorites, etc.) without using explicit sessionId or userId parameters.
